ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the player started playing for the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the player ended playing for the team */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (active, injured, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team competes in */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_details" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the second team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game */,
  "team1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "team2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators in the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee for the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_details_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_details_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the team the player belongs to
Position of the player on the team
Date of birth of the player
Height of the player in meters
Weight of the player in kilograms
Date the player started playing for the team
Date the player ended playing for the team
Current status of the player (active, injured, retired)
Name of the team's home stadium
Capacity of the team's home stadium
Location where the game was played
Number of spectators in the game
Name of the referee for the game
Indicates if the game went into overtime
